CPP contribution rates, maximums and exemptions

The following tables show the CPP contribution rates, maximum annual pensionable earnings, and basic exemption amounts.

CPP contribution rates and maximum amounts

Table 1 – CPP contribution rates, maximums and exemptions
Year Maximum annual pensionable earnings (YMPE) Basic exemption amount Maximum contributory earnings Employee and employer contribution rate (%) Maximum annual employee and employer contribution Maximum annual self-employed contribution
2026 $74,600 $3,500 $71,100 5.95 $4,230.45 $8,460.90
2025 $71,300 $3,500 $67,800 5.95 $4,034.10 $8,068.20
2024 $68,500 $3,500 $65,000 5.95 $3,867.50 $7,735.00

CPP2 contribution rates and maximum amounts

Table 2 – CPP2 contribution rates and second earnings ceiling (YAMPE)
Year Year's additional maximum pensionable earnings (YAMPE) Employee and employer contribution rate (%) Maximum annual employee and employer contribution
2026 $85,000 4.00 $416.00
2025 $81,900 4.00 $416.00
